caption:
They say teachers live on coffee, but I live on the thrill of a late-night lecture 😉📚

The empty lecture hall at midnight felt like our secret playground. I adjusted my black blazer, feeling the silk camisole underneath against my skin, the fabric hugging my curves in all the right places. A student, Alex, stayed late for 'extra credit,' and the air grew thick. He leaned in, whispering about the assignment, his hand brushing my wrist. I smiled, my heart racing against my ribs, feeling powerful and desired. The smell of old books and coffee hung in the air, mingling with the scent of his cologne. It was electric. I traced the rim of my pen, feeling the smooth texture. My pulse quickened, a secret rhythm only we knew. We didn't say much, just the sound of our voices and the soft click of my pen. It was a dance of restraint and desire, hidden beneath the professional attire, knowing exactly what I looked like beneath. The lights flickered low, and in that moment, I wasn't just a professor; I was the main event of the night. 😏💃

#TeacherDiaries #UniversitySecrets #LateNightVibes #CurvesAndClass #InstaTeacher #SexyProfessor #CampusLife #SilhouetteSecrets
